title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A retrospective discussion marking the 10th anniversary of AlphaGo's 2016 victory over Lee Sedol in Go. Presenters examine how the match catalyzed the modern AI revolution and enabled subsequent breakthroughs including protein folding solutions, establishing AlphaGo as a foundational moment for the field.
